help.title: Help
help.subtitle: Everything you need to know about FamilyRewards
help.footer: Have a question not listed here? Contact your family administrator.

start.title: Getting started
start.a1: FamilyRewards is an app to organize household chores in a fun way. Each family member earns points by completing their tasks, and can redeem those points for rewards defined by the administrator.
start.q2: How do I access my account?
start.a2: On the home screen, you will see cards for all your family members. Tap on your name to enter. You don't need a password in this version of the app.
start.q3: What is the difference between Administrator and Member?
start.a3: The Administrator (usually a parent) can create and manage tasks, rewards, members, challenges and multipliers. They also approve reward redemptions. Members can only view and complete their tasks, request redemptions, and view their achievements.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.q1: How do I mark a task as completed?
tasks.a1: In the "My Tasks" section or on the Dashboard, you will see the "Complete" button next to each pending task. When you press it, the task is marked as completed and you will receive the corresponding points instantly.
tasks.q2: What does skipping a task mean?
tasks.a2: Skipping a task means you are not going to do it that day. You won't receive points but it doesn't count negatively either. It is useful for recurring tasks that for some reason you cannot do that day.
tasks.a3: These are tasks that repeat automatically according to a pattern (for example, "Do homework" from Monday to Friday). Each day they will appear again on your list, either as pending or as completed by default.
tasks.q4: Can I view tasks from previous days?
tasks.a4: Yes. In the "Tasks" section you can browse the calendar to see tasks from any past or future day.

points.title: Points and multipliers
points.a1: You earn points by completing tasks. Each task has a point value defined by the administrator. You can also earn extra points through achievements, streaks, and family challenges.
points.a2: Multipliers are special events that the administrator activates for a specific period. For example, a x2 during the weekend doubles the points for all tasks you complete during those days.
points.q3: How do I know if there is an active multiplier?
points.a3: On the Dashboard you will see an orange alert banner when there is an active multiplier. It will also appear in the task list next to each affected task.
points.a4: The streak counts the consecutive days you have completed at least one task. In your profile you will see your current streak and your best historical streak. Maintaining the streak unlocks special achievements.

rewards.title: Rewards
rewards.q1: How do I redeem a reward?
rewards.a1: Go to the "Rewards" section, choose the one you want and press "Redeem". If you have enough points, a request will be sent to the administrator. You will receive confirmation when they approve it.
rewards.q2: What happens to my points when I redeem?
rewards.a2: Points are deducted from your balance when the administrator approves the redemption, not when you request it.
rewards.q3: Can I see the status of my requests?
rewards.a3: Yes. In the "Rewards" section, under the "My requests" tab, you will see all your requests with their status: pending, approved, or rejected.

challenges.title: Family challenges
challenges.a1: A family challenge is a goal that the whole family works together to achieve. For example: accumulate 500 points among everyone this week. If you succeed, all members receive a collective reward.
challenges.q2: How do I contribute to a challenge?
challenges.a2: When you complete tasks while a challenge is active, your progress is automatically added to the challenge. You can also press the contribute button in the Challenges section to add your contribution directly.
challenges.q3: What happens if we don't complete the challenge?
challenges.a3: If the challenge reaches its deadline without being completed, it will be marked as failed and the reward will not be granted. The administrator can create a new challenge whenever they want.

achievements.title: Achievements
achievements.a1: Achievements are unlocked automatically when you reach certain milestones: completing a number of tasks, maintaining a streak, redeeming rewards, etc. Check the Achievements section to see which ones you still need to earn.
achievements.a2: Yes, each achievement has a point value that is added to your total when you unlock it. Epic and legendary achievements give many more points than common ones.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.a1: The calendar shows your tasks organized by day. Days marked with colors have scheduled tasks. Red dots indicate local holidays based on your location settings.
calendar.q2: How do I set up holidays for my city?
calendar.a2: Go to "Settings" (location icon in the sidebar) and select your country, region, and city. The calendar will automatically display the corresponding holidays.

admin_general.title: Administration — General
admin_general.q1: How do I add a new family member?
admin_general.a1: Go to Admin → Members and press "Add member". Enter their name and avatar. The new member will appear on the login screen.
admin_general.q2: Can I manually adjust a member's points?
admin_general.a2: Yes. In Admin → Members, press the "Adjust points" button next to the member. You can add or subtract points and enter a reason for the history.

admin_tasks.title: Administration — Tasks
admin_tasks.q1: How do I create a recurring task?
admin_tasks.a1: In Admin → Task Management, press "New task" and enable the "Recurring" option. Select the days of the week and the default state (pending or completed).
admin_tasks.q2: What is the default state of a task?
admin_tasks.a2: "Completed by default" is useful for tasks that are always assumed done (like going to work) and only need to be marked as not completed in exceptional cases. "Pending by default" requires the member to actively complete it.
admin_tasks.q3: Can I use the task catalog?
admin_tasks.a3: Yes. In Admin → Task Catalog you will find 45+ templates organized by category (home, study, sports...). You can add them directly to your family with a single click.

admin_rewards.title: Administration — Rewards
admin_rewards.q1: How do I approve a redemption?
admin_rewards.a1: In Admin → Reward Management, under the "Pending requests" section, you will see all requests. Press Approve or Reject. When approved, points are automatically deducted.
admin_rewards.q2: Can I use the rewards catalog?
admin_rewards.a2: Yes. In Admin → Rewards Catalog there are 44+ ideas organized in 8 categories with suggested prices. You can add them to your family with a single click.

admin_templates.title: Administration — Seasonal templates
admin_templates.a1: These are predefined packages of tasks and rewards adapted to times of the year: Back to school, Summer, Christmas, Exams, and New Year. Activate them from Admin → Seasonal templates.
